1. When making decisions, i rely on objective logic than on my personal feeling or values
2. I would rather be honest and direct, even if it hurts someone's feeling, than prioritize harmony
3. When comforting someone, i tend to focus more on finding a practical solution to their problem
4. I feel more satisfied when a decision is fair and reasonable, rather than when it helps everyone feel supported
5. People generally describe me as more analytical and rational than empathetic and compassionate
